description: Authorization and access management throughout the employee lifecycle. Onboarding, role changes, offboarding procedures. Periodic access reviews with manager sign-off.

subcriteria.name: onboarding_process
subcriteria.reference_text: Onboarding checklist showing which systems new hires receive access to based on their role. Manager approval for initial access grants.

subcriteria.name: offboarding_process
subcriteria.reference_text: Offboarding procedure for revoking access upon termination. Timely deprovisioning, typically within 24 hours of termination. Confirmation that access was removed.

subcriteria.name: access_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Quarterly or annual access review process. Manager certifies that each employee's access is still appropriate. Review log with dates and approver names.

subcriteria.name: role_change_process
subcriteria.reference_text: Process for modifying access when employees change roles. Access from old role is revoked and new role access is provisioned.

mismatch_signals.reason: HR benefits onboarding document, not an access management procedure.
A list of users without review dates or approvals does not demonstrate a review process.
